summary: A clip from a CBS broadcast interview. A woman with long brown hair in a dark top speaks to camera, seated in front of a large blue Department of Homeland Security seal backdrop. A CBS FACE THE NATION logo sits in the lower-left corner throughout.

script.scene: A woman in a dark top speaks to camera against a blue DHS-seal backdrop, FACE THE NATION logo lower-left.
The speaker continues addressing the camera.
Close interview shot of the speaker continuing to talk.
